title: FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SWEET HOME EMERGENCY MINISTRIES FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides up to $100 of financial assistance for past due water, electricity, and rent bills. Also provides assistance with prescription medications excluding those that are pain medications or mood-altering, gasoline vouchers for verified out of town doctor's appointments only, and propane vouchers up to $25 that can be used at the Sweet Home RV Center. Individuals may only receive assistance once during a 12 month period. 1115 Long Street Sweet Home, OR 97386 Eligibility: Households with income at or below 185% of the FPL. Those seeking assistance with electricity, natural gas or water must have a shut-off notice. Hours: Tuesday/Wednesday/Saturday 9am-11:30am, closed 2nd Saturday of the month Email (541) 367-6504 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 367-6504 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in and complete an application or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address unless experiencing homelessness Utility assistance: Shut-off notice Gasoline assistance: Verification of date and location for doctors appointment LANGUAGES: English, American Sign Language, Spanish intake form and information available AREA SERVED: Sweet Home School District (Cities of Cascadia, Crawfordsville, Foster, and Sweet Home, and Zip Code 97386 Holley in unincorporated Linn County) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located next to the Fire Department Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Money Gas Service Payment Assistance Prescription Expense Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - SHEM FOOD PANTRY AND CARMEN'S CLOSET If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SWEET HOME EMERGENCY MINISTRIES
